THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAYER, FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY REGINAL MED CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
